info.description: Open source metering service for tracking who used what, when, how much, and in what context.
info.title: Open Spanner API

post.description: Queues a usage bucket export job. Jobs are created as queued and can be listed or inspected by ID.

parameters.description: Result limit. Defaults to 100 and cannot exceed 1000.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Subject or metadata keys to group by. Repeat the parameter or use comma-separated values.
parameters.name: group_by

post.description: Records one usage event. If idempotency_key matches a previously accepted event, the original event is returned. A duplicate event ID is a conflict.

Records up to 1000 usage events. The Idempotency-Key header replays the original bulk response for the same batch. Per-event idempotency_key values replay existing events as duplicates. Duplicate event IDs are conflicts.

parameters.description: Batch idempotency key. Reusing it returns the original bulk response.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

parameters.description: Subject or metadata keys to group by. Repeat the parameter or use comma-separated values.
parameters.name: group_by

parameters.description: Result limit. Defaults to 100 and cannot exceed 1000.
parameters.name: limit

idempotency_key.description: IdempotencyKey replays the original accepted event when reused.
